creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 145373
updated version of the shar, still with pkg-plist issues

See attached patch and please look at the poudriere build log on 8.4-i386
which you can find at

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/misc/pulseaudio-5.0.log

Please compare it with your version.

The updated version *still* has issues, probably options and the pkg-plist are not yet fully aligned ? Can you dig into this ?

My second big question: Can this replace audio/pulseaudio ? Or do all
the ports need to switch over step by step ? Can it be made to not conflict
with audio/pulseaudio ? Or does it *need* to replace the old stuff ?

Right now:

pkg-static: pulseaudio-5.0 conflicts with pulseaudio-0.9.23_2 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/esdcompat
